member.name: M:vega.Controllers.AuthController.GetTokens(vega.Controllers.DTO.AuthDTO)
member.summary: Authorizes user in system.
member.response: If user is not registered in system or password is wrong

member.name: M:vega.Controllers.AuthController.DestroySessionTokens
member.summary: Deactivates user's access-token and logs out user from system.

member.name: M:vega.Controllers.AuthController.GetUserIdentity
member.summary: Retrieves logged in user information.

member.name: M:vega.Controllers.AuthController.RefreshAccessToken(System.String)
member.summary: Refreshes user access token via refresh token.
member.response: Refresh has expired or not associated with user's access

member.summary: Method for calculating optimal 1d cutting.

member.summary: Method for calculating optimal 2d cutting with dxf

member.summary: 1D import csv file and formating him in json
member.returns: JSON file with details length and count
member.response: Input file is null or Invalid file type. Please upload a CSV file

member.summary: 1D formating json to csv and export csv file
member.returns: JSON file with details length and count
